description.en: XCON turned expert-system research into a visible industrial success. Built with production rules, it configured DEC VAX computer orders by matching customer requirements, component constraints, and assembly knowledge, reducing costly configuration errors at commercial scale.
description.zh: XCON 把专家系统研究转化为可见的工业成功。它以产生式规则构建，根据客户需求、组件约束和装配知识配置 DEC VAX 计算机订单，在商业规模上减少昂贵的配置错误。

html.en: Computer systems were sold as many interacting components, and human configuration errors could delay or break orders.
html.zh: 计算机系统由许多相互作用的组件销售，人为配置错误可能延误订单或导致错误交付。

html.en: Production rules matched facts in working memory, fired actions, and incrementally built a valid hardware configuration.
html.zh: 产生式规则匹配工作记忆中的事实，触发动作，并逐步构建有效硬件配置。

html.en: Experts generally treat XCON/R1 as a landmark industrial expert system and a proof that knowledge engineering could deliver business value. Its long-term legacy is the case-study role it plays in expert-system maintenance, rule management, and applied AI deployment.
html.zh: 专家通常把 XCON/R1 视为工业专家系统的标志性案例，也证明知识工程能够产生商业价值。它的长期影响在于成为专家系统维护、规则管理和应用 AI 部署的标准案例。

material.en: AAAI and Artificial Intelligence expert-system papers
material.zh: AAAI 与 人工智能 专家系统论文

demo.en: Turn customer requirements into a valid component list
demo.zh: 把客户需求转化为有效组件清单

text.zh: if-then 规则编码配置专长。

text.en: Current order facts are updated as rules fire.
text.zh: 规则触发时持续更新当前订单事实。

text.en: Expert knowledge is elicited, encoded, and maintained.
text.zh: 专家知识被获取、编码并维护。

title.en: R1: An Expert in the Computer Systems Domain
title.zh: R1：计算机系统领域的专家

description.en: AAAI paper describing the rule-based configuration expert system behind XCON/R1.
description.zh: 介绍 XCON/R1 背后基于规则的配置专家系统的 AAAI 论文。
